Entries.Name: OneDrive
Entries.Detail: Installs or completely uninstalls the OneDrive cloud sync client. Uninstalling removes sync, breaks OneDrive shell integration and links, and requires a manual reinstall if you want it back.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Installs or completely uninstalls the OneDrive cloud sync client. Uninstalling removes sync, breaks OneDrive links and shell integration, and requires a manual reinstall if you want it back.
